statement: In every magma, Equation 2142 (`x = ((y * y) * y) * (z * z)`) implies Equation 3646 (`x * y = z * ((w * z) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0669
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y y) y) (op z z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op z (op (op w z) w))
